name: C4 Therapeutics, Inc.
business: C4 Therapeutics is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing small-molecule protein degraders using its proprietary TORPEDO platform. Its pipeline includes two oncology clinical candidates: cemsidomide for multiple myeloma and CFT8919 for non-small cell lung cancer. The company also pursues discovery-stage programs in inflammation, neuroinflammation, and neurodegeneration.
sellsTo: patients with non-small cell lung cancer
pharmaceutical collaborators (Merck KGaA, Roche, Betta Pharma, Biogen)

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company dedicated to delivering on the promise of targeted protein degradation, or TPD, science to create a new generation of small-molecule medicines that transform patients lives.

Artificial Intelligence (AI) is increasingly being used in the pharmaceutical industry. We are employing AI as a tool to assist in degrader discovery and optimization, which is a significant element of our current business and our future strategy.

catalysts.event: First patient dosed in Phase 2 MOMENTUM trial evaluating cemsidomide in combination with dexamethasone for multiple myeloma
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, patients began enrolling in the Phase 2 MOMENTUM trial and full trial enrollment is expected to be completed in Q1 2027.

catalysts.event: Full trial enrollment completion for Phase 2 MOMENTUM trial
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, patients began enrolling in the Phase 2 MOMENTUM trial and full trial enrollment is expected to be completed in Q1 2027.

catalysts.event: Biogen milestone earned for advancement of BIIB129 (BTK degrader) into Phase 1 clinical development
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, the Company earned a second $2.0 million milestone from Biogen after Biogen advanced BIIB129, a BTK degrader, that was designed by us, into Phase 1 clinical development.

tamClaims.claim: Annual MM prevalence in fourth-line setting: approximately 42,000 patients in the US, UK, Germany, Italy, France, and Spain
tamClaims.sentence: In 2024, the annual MM prevalence was approximately 42,000 patients in the fourth line setting in the United States, United Kingdom, Germany, Italy, France and Spain.

tamClaims.claim: New cases of multiple myeloma: approximately 65,370 in the US, UK, and EU4 combined in 2024
tamClaims.sentence: According to estimates available through Evaluate Pharma, in 2024 there were approximately 65,370 new cases of MM in the United States, United Kingdom, and Germany, France, Spain, and Italy, or EU4, combined.

tamClaims.claim: NSCLC diagnosed patients in US, UK, and EU4: approximately 419,380 in 2024, with 10-15% having mutant EGFR
tamClaims.sentence: According to consensus estimates available through Evaluate Pharma approximately 419,380 patients in the United States, United Kingdom, and EU4 combined were diagnosed with NSCLC in 2024 and between 10 15% of these patients have mutant EGFR, or mEGFR.

tamClaims.claim: Annual NSCLC diagnoses in China: approximately 45,780, of which about 50% are driven by EGFR mutation
tamClaims.sentence: In China, where approximately 45,780 patients are diagnosed with NSCLC annually, approximately 50% of diagnoses are driven by the EGFR mutation.
